name: ORACLE CORP
summary: Oracle Corporation provides enterprise IT products and services including cloud applications (OCA), cloud infrastructure (OCI), database software, middleware, hardware (Engineered Systems, servers, storage), and professional services. Offerings are delivered via on-premise, cloud-based, and hybrid deployment models. Customers include businesses, government agencies, and educational institutions worldwide. Oracle invested $9.9 billion in R&D in fiscal 2025 to enhance existing offerings and develop new technologies including AI integration.
